app.title: LineageOS Statistics
app.author: pentagrama
proposed_tests: Visit the LineageOS Statistics page, verify device stats are up-to-date
Compare LineageOS statistics with AOSP statistics, check trends and differences
Conduct user study to evaluate the usability and effectiveness of LineageOS statistics
